sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0 or Amt4 = 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, Crcy, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,round(-sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, Crcy, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 > 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, Crcy, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 < 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,Crcy,'2005' as Co,'5SFI000001' as CC,-Amt1,-Amt2,-Amt3,-Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, '1999901' as GL, Crcy, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,round(-sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, Crcy, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 > 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, Crcy, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 < 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,TP,GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID,'2008' as Co,'2005' as TP, '2899901' as GL, Crcy, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2,  round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3,round(-Amt4,2) as Amt4, (case when PK = '40' then '50' else '40' end) as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,TP,GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID,'2008' as Co,'F0018' as TP, '2898900' as GL, Crcy, Amt1, Amt2,  Amt3, Amt4, PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901')
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Co = '2008',PC = '1400000000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2899901','2898900')
update TransX set Co = '2005',PC = '2310000000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901'
update TransX set Co = '2005',CC = '5SFI000001',Contract = '5SFI000001' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('2899901','2898900','1999901')
update TransX set TP = '2008' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901'
update TransX set Txt = 'Recharge SY''s costs to Hamblin Watsa for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
